title: Monomorphism
description: A library makes GTM addon development easy.
body:
# Monomorphism

## 🚧 Project Archived

> **This mod is no longer maintained.**
>
> Development has been discontinued and this project is now archived.  
> No further updates, bug fixes, or support will be provided.

## What is this?
A library makes GregTechCEu Modern addon development easy.
## Existing features
- Convenient methods for generating multiblock structure preview.
- Lots of block, blockentity and item base class.
- Rendering utilities based on LDLib
- Lots of GUI widgets.
## Contribution
- Some code comes from InfinityLib (MIT Licence)
